mapper.select: select cct.code_type_id ,cct.code_type ,cct.code_type_nm ,cct.code_type_nm_s ,cct.start_date ,cct.end_date ,cct.entry_type_cd ,cct.remark ,cct.create_date ,cct.create_by ,cct.update_date ,cct.update_by from com_code_type cct where 1=1 and cct.code_type like #{CODE_TYPE} ||'%' and cct.code_type_nm like #{CODE_TYPE_NM} ||'%' order by cct.code_type
select count(1) as row_cnt from com_code_type cct where 1=1 and cct.code_type like #{CODE_TYPE} ||'%' and cct.code_type_nm like #{CODE_TYPE_NM} ||'%'
